channel.title: Public Belief on Alien Truth Social
channel.description: Recent content in Public Belief on Alien Truth Social

item.title: Public opinion on extraterrestrial life
item.description:
Public opinion surveys indicate a widespread belief in the existence of intelligent alien civilizations, often exceeding scientific confidence levels. Studies show significant cross-national variation in belief, with some research highlighting a gap between public perception and expert consensus. Demographic factors, such as religious observance and age, correlate with differing beliefs, and psychological factors like exposure to UFO content also play a role. Public interest in extraterrestrial life is further reflected in search trends and the popularity of media related to speculative theories.

Source: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Public_opinion_on_extraterrestrial_life
